description: Recovery-oriented runs must classify failures cleanly, preserve evidence, and avoid blind retry loops.

rubric_dimensions.name: recovery_quality
rubric_dimensions.description: The run must classify and route failure explicitly.

rubric_dimensions.name: operator_handoff_quality
rubric_dimensions.description: Operators should get clear next actions.

rubric_dimensions.name: planning_quality
rubric_dimensions.description: Recovery runs still need planning context.

rubric_dimensions.name: test_adequacy
rubric_dimensions.description: Validation evidence should explain what was or was not rerun.

known_failure_cases: same failure class refined repeatedly without loop stop
repo-state or transport failure with no explicit recovery action
